basic_details.job_title: ALIMCO Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 165 Junior Manager, Officer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Artificial Limbs Manufacturing Corporation of India (ALIMCO), Kanpur
basic_details.post_name: IT Consultant, Lead AI Expert, UI/UX Developer, AI Accessibility Consultant, Young Professional (AI), IT Assistant, Assistant Manager (Plastic), Junior Manager (Production-Textiles), Junior Manager (Civil), Officer (Civil), Safety Officer, Quality Controller, P&O Clinical, Prosthetic & Orthotic, Audiologist, Optometrist, Special Educator and others
basic_details.short_information: ALIMCO Various Contractual Recruitment 2026: Artificial Limbs Manufacturing Corporation of India (ALIMCO), Kanpur has released notification for 165 contractual posts under Reference No. FTC/Contractual/April-2026. The vacancies include positions in IT, Artificial Intelligence, Production, Civil, Clinical P&O, Audiology, Optometry, Special Educator and other departments. Online applications are invited from 14 April 2026 to 13 May 2026 through the ALIMCO ERP portal. Eligible candidates can download the official notification PDF from the ALIMCO website alimco.in.

age_limit.details: Upper age limit varies from 30 years to 50 years as on 01.04.2026 depending upon the post. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC(NCL)/EWS/PwBD candidates as per Government of India rules.

qualification.details: Candidates must possess the prescribed educational qualifications and experience as on the closing date of application. Most technical posts require minimum 55% marks in the qualifying degree/diploma. | Educational Qualification

vacancy_details.Post Name: IT Consultant -Technical (Java, PHP, Server Admin, CMS, Database)
Lead AI Expert -(Mission AI for Disability Empowerment)

AI Accessibility Consultant (Mission AI for Disability Empowerment)

ALIMCO HQ Kanpur and various Centers

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will be paid consolidated monthly remuneration as per the following details:

selection_process: The selection will be done through the following process:
Screening of applications based on eligibility
qualification and experience Shortlisting of candidates Personal Interview (Physical or Online mode) Final selection based on interview performance
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the ALIMCO official ERP portal. Candidates are required to create a profile, fill all details correctly and upload scanned copies of required documents (Photo, Signature, Educational Certificates, Experience certificates, Caste/PwBD certificate etc.).
important_instructions: Candidates must read the official notification carefully before applying. All documents uploaded must be clear and legible. No application fee is to be paid. Selected candidates will be appointed on purely contractual basis. No claim for regular absorption. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. ALIMCO reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process at any stage.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in ALIMCO Contractual Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 165 contractual vacancies have been notified across IT, Production, Project & Maintenance, Quality Control, Clinical (P&O, Audiology, Optometry, Special Education) and Materials/Stores departments under Reference No. FTC/Contractual/April‑2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the online application dates for ALIMCO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process starts on 14 April 2026 (from 12:00 PM) and the last date for submission of the online form on the ALIMCO ERP portal is 13 May 2026 up to 05:00 PM.

faq.question: Q3. What are the key posts and vacancy distribution in ALIMCO Contractual Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Major posts include 2 IT Consultant (Technical), 1 Lead AI Expert, 1 UI/UX Developer, 1 AI Accessibility Consultant, 2 Young Professionals (AI), 1 IT Assistant, several technical/engineering roles, and large clinical blocks such as 30 Prosthetic & Orthotic, 20 P&O Technicians, 50 Audiologists, 10 Optometrists, 20 Special Educators (ID/VI), plus Warehouse/Store/Procurement Assistants totalling 165 posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for ALIMCO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Upper age limits vary post‑wise from 30 to 50 years (e.g., 50 years for IT Consultant & Lead AI Expert, 45 for UI/UX and P&O Junior Manager, 40 for most clinical/technical posts, 32 for IT Assistant, and 30 for Store/Procurement Assistants), with relaxations for SC/ST/OBC(NCL)/EWS/PwBD as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for ALIMCO IT and AI posts (Consultant/Lead/Young Professional)?
faq.answer: IT/AI posts require a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science/IT/AI or MCA with relevant certifications (Java/PHP/server admin for IT Consultant, AI/accessibility/UI‑UX certifications for AI Expert, Accessibility Consultant and UI/UX Developer, and CS/IT/MCA with AI knowledge for Young Professional)

faq.question: Q6. What is the qualification for ALIMCO engineering and quality posts (Civil, Plastic, Textiles, QC, Safety)?
faq.answer: These roles generally need a full‑time B.E/B.Tech or 3‑year Diploma in the relevant branch (Civil, Plastic, Textile, Mechanical) with at least 55% marks; Safety Officer additionally needs an Industrial Safety qualification as per Factories Act; QC Textiles requires Diploma/Degree in Textile Technology.

faq.question: Q7. What are the qualifications for ALIMCO clinical posts (P&O, Audiologist, Optometrist, Special Educator)?
faq.answer: P&O posts require Bachelor/Master in Prosthetics & Orthotics with valid RCI registration; P&O Technicians need CPO/CBS certificate or Diploma in P&O (RCI accredited); Audiologists need BASLP/MASLP with RCI CRR registration; Optometrists need B.Optometry; Special Educators must hold RCI‑recognised Bachelor’s in Special Education (ID/VI) with CRR registration.

faq.question: Q8. What is the monthly remuneration for ALIMCO Contractual posts 2026?
faq.answer: Consolidated pay ranges from ₹25,000 to ₹1,80,000 per month: ₹1,80,000 for Lead AI Expert, ₹1,05,000 for IT Consultant and UI/UX/AI Accessibility Consultants, ₹75,000 for Assistant Manager (Plastic), ₹60,000 for Junior Managers and P&O Clinical (upper slab), ₹30,000–₹40,000 for P&O/Audiologist, and ₹25,000–₹35,000 for Special Educators and technicians; most support posts (IT Assistant, QC, Warehouse/Store/Procurement) get around ₹35,000 per month.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for ALIMCO Contractual Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any of the advertised contractual posts; candidates can submit the online form free of cost.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for ALIMCO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications will be screened and shortlisted based on eligibility, qualifications and experience; shortlisted candidates will be called (by email/Speed Post) for interview (online or offline), and final selection will be based on interview performance, with ALIMCO reserving the right to accept or reject any candidature.
